name: electrical_engineer_apac_industrial_companies
goal: move into advanced industrial companies in APAC

communication_style.description: Short and somewhat dry communication style. Gives compact replies and often answers only the direct question without extra context. Sometimes uses technical shorthand or incomplete phrasing that still makes sense contextually. Not rude, just minimalistic. May occasionally forget punctuation.

first_prompt: Electrical engineer, background in manufacturing and automation. Looking for industrial companies in Singapore, especially around advanced manufacturing and industrial automation. Main priorities are innovation level, fit with my specialization, and technical growth opportunities.
